title: Crafting Villager
description: Adds a crafting recipe for villager spawn eggs  so you don't have to find villages to get a villager!
body:
Hey, how are you?


If you are here it is because you can not find a village on Minecraft so this mod is made for you. Why?

This mod allows you to craft villagers with materials that are related to the villager's environment.
And finally, you can also make an iron golem here is what the mod presents for the instant go see in the photos of the mod the crafts!
[iron golem crafting recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4dd8bb913b9d8f430668c0d4291e896f39de63db.webp)![Villager recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4ebbb2bcc0d77202807a215b771b4ffff0e66882.webp)
